text:
The JoyStation Console (ジョイステーション, JoiSutēshon) is an old third-generation console used for outdated video games like Greed Island. 

Appearance

The JoyStation looks much like a PlayStation. It appears to have two game disc compartments, four memory card slots, and two controller plugs. It has one wire to plug into a wall and one to plug into a TV. They can also plug into each other. 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

It is first shown when Killua and Gon must buy one for a memory card Ging left Gon in the "Nen box". They plug in the memory card to learn about the game Greed Island. The Auctioneer of the Southernpiece Auction House showcases a JoyStation Console for auction and demonstrates its power with a Greed Island copy inside it. It is later shown in vast quantity owned by Battera after he hires many people to play the game. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 13, Chapter 126 

Trivia

The name "JoyStation" is most likely a parody of the famous PlayStation console.
